query:
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_gastos,
  SUM(CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(15,2))) as total_monto,
  expenseType,
  dataOrigin
FROM expenses
WHERE deletedAt IS NULL
GROUP BY expenseType, dataOrigin
ORDER BY total_monto DESC
command:

  expenseType,
  dataOrigin
